title: lomatium latilobum
intro: Lomatium latilobum, also known as fern-leaved biscuitroot, is a perennial plant species native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Lomatium latilobum include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lomatium latilobum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
